  "findings": [
    "Undersized motor overloads staged for installation, which will cause nuisance tripping or fail to protect the motor properly if mismatched."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged undersized motor overloads.",
    "Verify the motor nameplate Full-Load Amps (FLA).",
    "Procure and stage correctly sized overload heaters/relays matching the motor FLA and Service Factor (SF) per NEC Article 430 Part III."
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged motor overloads are undersized for the application. Under NEC Article 430, specifically Part III (Overload Protection), overloads must be selected based on the motor nameplate full-load current rating and service factor to prevent premature tripping while ensuring adequate thermal protection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430 Part III",
    "NEC Section 430.32"
  ]
}
